cd_001_min_confidence.title: Minimum Confidence Floor
cd_001_min_confidence.description: Never auto-apply proposals below 0.80 confidence across any skill.
cd_001_min_confidence.example: Reject a 0.75-confidence instruction proposal; require manual review.

cd_002_test_case_first.title: Test Case Before Instruction
cd_002_test_case_first.description: For any historically broken fixture, require a test_case proposal to accompany instruction proposals.
cd_002_test_case_first.example: Block instruction-only patches to a risky fixture; wait for regression test.

cd_003_no_churn.title: Change Budget Enforcement
cd_003_no_churn.description: Reject patches that change >10 targets or add >100 lines without explicit approval.
cd_003_no_churn.example: Rollback a patch that touched 15 files; review necessity before retry.
